titleStmt.title: SII 20.192: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 192. (B.K. No. 112 of 1935-36.) KUMAṬGI, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the front wall of the deserted Hanumān temple in the old site of the village.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year, 16, Yuva, Bhādrapada, śu Pūrṇimā, Wednesday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1215, September 9, Wednesday. There was an eclipse on that day.
The inscription records the renewal of a gift to the temple of Bhōgēśvara by Mahadēvarasa and others, of Kuṁbiṭage. The āchārya of the temple was Sōvarāsi. The details of the gift are not specified.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmatu yādavanā
rāyaṇa pratāpa cakravartti siṁgaṇadēvavarṣada 16
yuva śaṁvatsarada bhādrapada śudha hu(ṁ)ṇnave budhavā
ra sōmagrahaṇaraṁdu kuṁbiṭageya ciṁtā
yaka mahadēvarasanuṁ mādayya Alliya mūli
garu Eṁṭu hiṭṭu Ā hūḍida gauḍaru mukhya
vāgi śrī mūlasthāna bhōgēśvaradēvarige sarvvana
masyavāgi punarddhāreya māḍidaru Ā sthāna
dācārya sōvarāsi . stadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā
yō harēta vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhā
yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 20.192 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
